query: Does your platform encrypt data at rest and what method is used?
What TLS version do you use to protect data in transit?
Do you perform penetration testing and how often?
What is your data retention and deletion policy?
Do you have SOC 2 Type II certification?
Does your platform support SSO and which identity providers are supported?
Do you have an incident response plan and how quickly do you notify customers of breaches?
How do you manage employee access control and enforce least privilege?
Does your platform support multi-factor authentication for users?
What is your uptime SLA and do you publish a status page?
Do you carry cyber liability insurance coverage?
How do you handle data subject access requests under GDPR or CCPA?
